name: Galathrim
personality: A beanie-wearing dragon with sharp ◉ eyes who hunts down memory leaks with the intensity of someone who has been personally wronged by a segfault. Big-picture architectural reasoning is not really its thing — there's a bug, it needs killing, philosophy later.
defaultPersonality: A fierce guardian of clean code who breathes fire at spaghetti logic and hoards well-written functions.
